name: Agency Planner
tagline: Digital marketing agency platform with AI content and social scheduling
description: Agency Planner is a comprehensive multi-tenant platform for digital marketing agencies. It provides social media content planning and scheduling across Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn, WhatsApp conversation management, email newsletter campaigns with audience segmentation, and AI-powered content generation — all with role-based team collaboration and approval workflows.
highlights: Social media scheduling for Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn with approval workflows
AI-powered content generation with OpenAI GPT-4o and per-client prompt customization
WhatsApp conversation management with contact handling and document processing
Email newsletter system with audience segmentation and campaign analytics
Multi-tenant architecture with 7 role levels and team collaboration
aiDetails: Built with Claude Code (CLAUDE.md present), uses OpenAI GPT-4o for content generation
